reviews.review_title: Never get it I promise you
reviews.review_description: There was three people with me and I was making clan only become friends and then by the way I meet them in City and we making a clan and we join a code and I wus practicing my juking and I went on the double walls and then it happened I did whispers in The night landed on the platform a green monkey twisted his head and looked at me and it almost gave me a heart attack and it kicked me out of my code never did this game I promise you I'm scared.....

developer_response.body: Hey! we get that this guy was a real person, you will be able to disable it ight, to make sure you wont get scared like that next time. Sorry about this, it was apart of our first "horror" update.
